PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?goals WHERE {
  wd:Q69622172 p:P1923 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1923 ?team .
  ?participation pq:P1352 ?position .
  ?participation pq:P1351 ?goals .
  FILTER(?position = 2)
}
